title: TIME-DOMAIN ANALYSIS OF CONTINUOUS-TIME SYSTEMS
summary: This page derives the exponential-form solution for a homogeneous Nth-order linear differential equation with constant coefficients. By assuming y_0(t)=ce^{λt}, it obtains the characteristic equation Q(λ)=0 and shows that distinct roots λ_1 through λ_N lead to exponential solutions of the form c_ie^{λ_it}.
